examples.english: I saw [only] one man and one woman.

examples.text: اَلزَّانِيَةُ وَٱلزَّانِي فَٱجْلِدُوا كُلَّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا مِئَةَ جَلْدَةٍ
examples.english: As for female and male fornicators, give each one of them one hundred lashes

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Proto-Semitic *ʔaḥad- ~ *waḥad-
Arabic واحد
Inherited from Proto-Semitic *ʔaḥad- ~ *waḥad- (“one”).
